description.value:
Trigger A creature within your reach causes you to fall or knocks you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone].

You know how easy it is for a falling person to cause another to lose their footing at the same time, and how to use that to your advantage. As you fall, you grab onto an enemy using your hands or legs, and pull them down with you.

Attempt an @Check[athletics|defense:reflex] check against the triggering creature's Reflex DC. On a success, the creature falls with you (though it can still attempt to [[/act grab-an-edge]]) or is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone].
